/* Compute the reverse prefix sum of the vector x into output.

   output: [2, 8, 14, 18, 25, 26]

   input: [3, 3, 7, 1, -2]
   output: [-2, -1, 6, 9, 12]
*/
void reversePrefixSum(std::vector<int> const& x, std::vector<int> &output) {
